steps.name: precheck-operator
steps.plan: 确认 WoodpeckerCluster CRD（woodpeckerclusters.woodpecker.zilliz.io）已注册（operator 就位）

steps.name: apply-cr
steps.plan:
将 apply：
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: e2e-wp-config
  namespace: mb-e2e
data:
  woodpecker.yaml: "woodpecker:\n  meta:\n    type: etcd\n  storage:\n    type: service\n\
    \    rootPath: /woodpecker/data\nlog:\n  level: info\n  format: json\n  stdout:\
    \ true\netcd:\n  endpoints:\n  - e2e-etcd.mb-e2e.svc:2379\n  rootPath: by-dev\n\
    minio:\n  address: minio.mb-e2e.svc\n  port: 80\n  accessKeyID: minioadmin\n \
    \ secretAccessKey: minioadmin\n  bucketName: woodpecker\n  rootPath: files\n"
---
apiVersion: woodpecker.zilliz.io/v1alpha1
kind: WoodpeckerCluster
metadata:
  name: e2e-wp
  namespace: mb-e2e
spec:
  image: milvusdb/woodpecker:latest
  replicas: 3
  storageSize: 10Gi
  servicePort: 18080
  gossipPort: 17946
  metricsPort: 9091
  configRef:
    name: e2e-wp-config

audit: step 'wait-status' failed: e2e-wp CR 未就绪（status.phase=Creating）
